EmailTemplate.description: This email template is used for sending invoices to lessees via bulk invoicing.
EmailTemplate.name: Bulk CreditMemo Send Email Template
EmailTemplate.subject: [Lessee Name] | [Month- Year] | Credit Memo(s)
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear [Lessee Name] team,
Please find the attached [Month- Year] Credit Memo(s) available on your account.
Kind Regards,
